SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.util

Class X509Extensions

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.util.X509Extensions
public class X509Extensions extends Object
X.509 extension parsing utilities to replace Bouncy Castle dependencies. Extracts URLs and other data from certificate extensions.
Author:
Milton Smith

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    X509Extensions.SignedCertificateTimestamp
    Represents a Signed Certificate Timestamp.

  • Method Details

    • getOcspUrl

      public static String getOcspUrl(X509Certificate cert)
      Extract the OCSP responder URL from Authority Information Access extension.
      Parameters:
      cert - The certificate to examine
      Returns:
      The OCSP responder URL, or null if not found

    • getCaIssuersUrl

      public static String getCaIssuersUrl(X509Certificate cert)
      Extract the CA Issuers URL from Authority Information Access extension.
      Parameters:
      cert - The certificate to examine
      Returns:
      The CA Issuers URL, or null if not found

    • getCrlUrls

      public static List<String> getCrlUrls(X509Certificate cert)
      Extract CRL distribution point URLs from the certificate.
      Parameters:
      cert - The certificate to examine
      Returns:
      List of CRL URLs, may be empty

    • getCrlUrl

      public static String getCrlUrl(X509Certificate cert)
      Extract the first CRL URL from the certificate.
      Parameters:
      cert - The certificate to examine
      Returns:
      The first CRL URL, or null if not found

    • getSubjectAlternativeNames

      public static List<String> getSubjectAlternativeNames(X509Certificate cert)
      Extract Subject Alternative Names from the certificate.
      Parameters:
      cert - The certificate to examine
      Returns:
      List of SANs as strings (DNS names, IPs, emails, URIs)

    • getScts

      public static List<X509Extensions.SignedCertificateTimestamp> getScts(X509Certificate cert)
      Extract Signed Certificate Timestamps (SCTs) from the certificate extension.
      Parameters:
      cert - The certificate to examine
      Returns:
      List of SCT details as strings

    • parseSctList

      public static List<X509Extensions.SignedCertificateTimestamp> parseSctList(byte[] data)
      Parse a TLS-encoded SCT list.

    • hasMustStaple

      public static boolean hasMustStaple(X509Certificate cert)
      Check if the certificate has the Must-Staple extension.
      Parameters:
      cert - The certificate to examine
      Returns:
      true if Must-Staple is present
